about.title: About Me
about.body: Full stack software engineer with experience building web applications and custom systems across diverse contexts. I specialize in spotting real-world needs and turning them into effective, user-focused software. I combine technical excellence with strategic thinking, integrating agile practices, architectural design, and clean, testable code. I work as an independent developer and enjoy building products that solve real-world problems.

items.title: Casa del Kumis — Website
items.description: Responsive landing and informational site focused on brand identity, catalog and on-page SEO.

caseStudy.problem: The company needed a professional digital presence with a product catalog and optimization for local searches.
caseStudy.solution: Responsive site with HTML/CSS/JS, optimized WebP images, semantic structure and meta tags for on-page SEO.
caseStudy.impact: Active digital presence with Lighthouse scores above 90 in performance and accessibility.

items.title: POS — Casa del Kumis
items.description: Point-of-sale system running in production across 18 branches. Billing integrated with Credinbanco API for card payments via payment terminal.

caseStudy.problem: 18 branches operated with manual records, no electronic payment integration and no centralized sales control.
caseStudy.solution: React POS system with real-time order management and Credinbanco API integration for card terminal payments.
caseStudy.impact: System live across all 18 branches from day one with digital payments fully integrated.

items.title: Bank Reconciliation Tool
items.description: Financial tool that cross-references payment vouchers against bank statements in detail to verify everything is in order.

caseStudy.problem: Bank reconciliation was entirely manual, taking several hours per period and prone to human error.
caseStudy.solution: Web tool that automatically cross-references Credinbanco vouchers against the bank statement and highlights discrepancies in real time.
caseStudy.impact: Reconciliation time reduced from hours to minutes per accounting period.

items.title: ERP — Food Sales System
items.description: Java MVC ERP system for managing sales, customers, inventory and reports. Actively in development.

caseStudy.problem: Small food distribution businesses lacked an integrated system for sales, inventory and customer management.
caseStudy.solution: Desktop ERP in Java MVC with Swing UI, JDBC/MySQL persistence and Excel export using Apache POI.
caseStudy.impact: Functional system with sales, inventory, customer and exportable Excel reports modules.

items.title: Facturas App — Invoice OCR
items.description: Thesis backend: processes invoice images with computer vision pipelines and extracts key fields (NIT, total, date) using OCR and FastAPI.

caseStudy.problem: Manual invoice processing for data extraction was slow, repetitive and not scalable for high volumes.
caseStudy.solution: Python backend with FastAPI that processes invoice images using OCR and computer vision to extract NIT, date, total and line items.
caseStudy.impact: Automated processing with over 94% accuracy on key extracted fields.

items.title: Personal Portfolio
items.description: This portfolio: Next.js 15 with i18n (ES/EN), Framer Motion, Tailwind v4 and email delivery via Resend. Deployed on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Needed a modern, bilingual, high-performance portfolio that reflected my technical capabilities.
caseStudy.solution: Next.js 15 with App Router, next-intl for i18n, Tailwind v4, Framer Motion and Resend for the contact form.
caseStudy.impact: Portfolio deployed on Vercel with ES/EN support, fluid animations and interactive WebGL background.

bullets: POS system deployed across 18 active branches with Credinbanco API integration for card payments via terminal.
Bank reconciliation tool (punteo) that automatically matches vouchers against bank statements to detect discrepancies.
Maintained company website with SEO optimization, WebP media and mobile-first responsive design.
Built ERP to manage sales, inventory and customers (Java MVC + MySQL).
Desktop UI with Swing; JDBC persistence and Excel export (POI).
Experimental WhatsApp notifications on successful sales.
Custom web solutions for small businesses (landing + e-commerce MVPs).
Component systems and design tokens to scale UI consistency.
